title.en: with circulation of working fluids through underground channels, the working fluids not coming into direct contact with the ground
using tube assemblies suitable for insertion into boreholes in the ground, e.g. geothermal probes
using bent tubes; using tubes assembled with connectors or with return headers
using tubes closed at one end, i.e. return-type tubes
using underground water as working fluid; using working fluid injected directly into the ground, e.g. using injection wells and recovery wells
using underground reservoirs for accumulating working fluids or intermediate fluids
operated without external energy sources, e.g. using thermosiphonic circulation or heat pipes

title.ko: 지열 시스템 (지열 에너지로부터 기계적 동력을 생산하기 위한 것 F03G 4/00 )
title.en: Geothermal systems (for producing mechanical power from geothermal energy F03G0004000000)
